CustomField.description: SC-23: Only product records with the following values in the BD_DChain_Spec_Status__c field can be shown in the CPQ quote line editor: Z3, ZA, ZQ, ZS, ZW, ZY
CustomField.formula: BD_DChain_Spec_Status__c = 'Z3' || BD_DChain_Spec_Status__c = 'ZA' || BD_DChain_Spec_Status__c = 'ZQ' || BD_DChain_Spec_Status__c = 'ZS' || BD_DChain_Spec_Status__c = 'ZW' || BD_DChain_Spec_Status__c = 'ZY'
CustomField.label: CPQ Sellable
